title: 小倉記念の後に・メッキでも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature gains a little bit of confidence after
she answers the cheers of the people from
Kokura's shopping district with a great race
result.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this confidence, Nice Nature aspires to run
in the Kikuka Sho to challenge Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before leaving Kokura the following day, I give
Nice Nature a handmade origami trophy as a
token of her growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature seems to be touched by the gesture,
and states that she will do her best in the next
race.
